```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(colorRamp2)
#library(ReactomePA) # can't install this
library(clusterProfiler)
library(DOSE)
library(readr)
source(here("scripts/00_get_crossSigs_enrichedGO.R"))
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
marray_path_up <- here("data/v2/microarray_pathways/up")
rnaseq_path_up <- here("data/v2/RNAseq_pathways/up")
```

```{r}
pattern <- "GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
prefix_sub <- "GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
suffix_sub <- "up.tsv"
annotation_file = here('data/metadata/direct-annotations__Homo_sapiens__Entrez.tsv')
```

```{r read in summary table}
summary_df <- read.delim(here("data/metadata/202506_all_TB_signatures_info.tsv"), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
summary_df
```

### Upregulated genes' pathways
```{r microarray up pathway}
marray_GO_mat_up = get_GO_testStat_matrix(marray_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
colnames(marray_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_limma", "", colnames(marray_GO_mat_up))
cols_to_keep_marray <- intersect(colnames(marray_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "up_aggregated_microarray_DE.tsv"))
marray_GO_mat_up <- marray_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_marray]
colnames(marray_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_DE.tsv", "", colnames(marray_GO_mat_up))
```

```{r RNAseq up pathway}
rnaseq_GO_mat_up = get_GO_testStat_matrix(rnaseq_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_DESeq2", "", colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up))
cols_to_keep_rnaseq <- intersect(colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "up_aggregated_RNAseq_DE.tsv"))
rnaseq_GO_mat_up <- rnaseq_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_rnaseq]
colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_DE.tsv", "", colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up))
```

```{r combine microarray and RNAseq}
df1 <- marray_GO_mat_up
df2 <- rnaseq_GO_mat_up

# Reshape from wide to long
library(tidyr)
long1 <- pivot_longer(df1, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")
long2 <- pivot_longer(df2, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")

# Combine long formats and sum values where matching
library(dplyr)
combined_long <- bind_rows(long1, long2) %>%
  group_by(Description, Signature) %>%
  summarise(
  Value = if (all(is.na(Value))) NA_real_ else max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop"
)

# Reshape back to wide format
final_df_up <- pivot_wider(combined_long, names_from = Signature, values_from = Value)
colnames(final_df_up) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(final_df_up))

# Identify columns with "aggregated" in their names
agg_cols <- grep("aggregated", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)

# Identify columns that do not contain "aggregated"
non_agg_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_up), agg_cols)

# Reorder the dataframe
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, c(non_agg_cols, agg_cols)]
# Identify columns
desc_col <- grep("Description", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
gpl_cols <- grep("GPL", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
rnaseq_col <- grep("RNAseq", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
other_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_up), c(gpl_cols, rnaseq_col))

# Reorder dataframe
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, c(desc_col, gpl_cols, other_cols, rnaseq_col)]
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, !duplicated(colnames(final_df_up))]
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, !grepl("HIV", colnames(final_df_up))]
```

```{r}
GO_annotation = get_GO_annotation(annotation_file)
```

### MW stats up signatures
```{r circulating vs lung}
rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up <- final_df_up
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(tissue_category)) %>%
            select(SIGNATURE_NAME, tissue_category)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df_$SIGNATURE_NAME)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, tissue_category) %>%
  deframe()

# Compute median difference per GO term
median_diffs_df <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "circulating"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "lung"])])

  median_agg <- median(group_1_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  median_indiv <- median(group_2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

  diff <- median_indiv - median_agg
  return(diff)
})
median_diffs_df <- data.frame(GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered), median_diff = median_diffs_df)

# Mann-Whitney test
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "circulating"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "lung"])])

  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Prepare results
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  left_join(median_diffs_df, by = "GO_term") %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Top 10 GO terms
top10_positive <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff > 0)  %>% arrange(desc(median_diff)) %>% slice(1:10)
top10_negative <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff < 0) %>% arrange(median_diff) %>% slice(1:10)

# Create gt tables
gt_top10_positive <- top10_positive %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO Terms Enriched in Circulating") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Circulating - Lung)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

gt_top10_negative <- top10_negative %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO Terms Enriched in Lung") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Circulating - Lung)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Combine top 10 positive and negative as a single dataframe first
top_combined_df <- bind_rows(
  top10_positive %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Circulating"),
  top10_negative %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Lung")
)

# Create one combined gt table
gt_top_bottom <- top_combined_df %>%
  select(GO_term, Enriched_in, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top Upregulated GO Terms More Enriched in Circulating or Lung") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    Enriched_in = "Enriched In",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Circulating - Lung)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Display combined table
gtsave(gt_top_bottom, "up_circulating_lung_signiGO_terms.pdf")

```

```{r microarray vs. RNASeq}
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(technology), !grepl("aggregated", SIGNATURE_NAME)) %>%
            select(SIGNATURE_NAME, technology)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, technology) %>%
  deframe()

# Compute median difference per GO term
median_diffs_df <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "microarray"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "RNAseq"])])

  median_agg <- median(group_1_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  median_indiv <- median(group_2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

  diff <- median_indiv - median_agg
  return(diff)
})
median_diffs_df <- data.frame(GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered), median_diff = median_diffs_df)

# Mann-Whitney test
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "microarray"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "RNAseq"])])

  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Prepare results
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  left_join(median_diffs_df, by = "GO_term") %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Top 10 GO terms
top10_positive <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff > 0)  %>% arrange(desc(median_diff)) %>% slice(1:10)
top10_negative <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff < 0) %>% arrange(median_diff) %>% slice(1:10)

# Create gt tables
gt_top10_positive <- top10_positive %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO Terms Enriched in Microarray") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Microarray - RNAseq)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

gt_top10_negative <- top10_negative %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO Terms Enriched in RNAseq") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Microarray - RNAseq)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Combine top 10 positive and negative as a single dataframe first
top_combined_df <- bind_rows(
  top10_positive %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Microarray"),
  top10_negative %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "RNAseq")
)

# Create one combined gt table
gt_top_bottom <- top_combined_df %>%
  select(GO_term, Enriched_in, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top Upregulated GO Terms More Enriched in Microarray or RNAseq") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    Enriched_in = "Enriched In",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Microarray - RNAseq)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Display combined table
gtsave(gt_top_bottom, "up_microarray_rnaseq_signiGO_terms.pdf")
```
```{r MTB vs. PTB}
### Not valid to perform a statistical test; not enough power
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(SIGNATURE_NAME), !is.na(tb_status)) %>%
            select(SIGNATURE_NAME, tb_status)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df_$SIGNATURE_NAME)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, tb_status) %>%
  deframe()

# Initialize results
results <- data.frame(
  GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered),
  p_value = NA_real_,
  statistic = NA_real_
)

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term
for (i in seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered))) {
  values <- go_mat_filtered[i, ]
  
  lung_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "PTB"])])
  circ_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "MTB"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(lung_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(circ_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(lung_vals, circ_vals, exact = FALSE)
    results$p_value[i] <- test$p.value
    results$statistic[i] <- test$statistic
  }
}

# adjust p-values using BH correction
results <- results %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

results <- arrange(results, p_adj)
#head(results)

significant_go_terms <- results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) 
head(significant_go_terms)
```

```{r cell line vs. primary}
## Not enough power for a statistical test
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(SIGNATURE_NAME), !is.na(sample_origin)) %>%
            select(SIGNATURE_NAME, sample_origin)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, sample_origin) %>%
  deframe()

# Initialize results
results_cellline_primary <- data.frame(
  GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered),
  p_value = NA_real_,
  statistic = NA_real_
)

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term
for (i in seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered))) {
  values <- go_mat_filtered[i, ]
  
  lung_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "cell line"])])
  circ_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "primary"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(lung_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(circ_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(lung_vals, circ_vals, exact = FALSE)
    results_cellline_primary$p_value[i] <- test$p.value
    results_cellline_primary$statistic[i] <- test$statistic
  }
}

# adjust p-values using BH correction
results_cellline_primary <- results_cellline_primary %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

results_cellline_primary <- arrange(results_cellline_primary, p_adj)
#head(results)

significant_go_terms <- results_cellline_primary %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) # None
head(significant_go_terms)

# Convert significant GO terms dataframe to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Cell Line vs. Primary | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```

```{r one cell/tissue type vs. rest}
# Not enough stats power
# List of platforms to iterate over
platforms <- unique(summary_df$tissue_cell_type) 

# Initialize an empty list to store the results for each platform
all_results <- list()

# Iterate over each platform
for (platform in platforms) {
  
  # Separate the group with signatures that partially match the current platform
  group_1_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(grepl(platform, tissue_cell_type)) %>% pull(SIGNATURE_NAME)
  group_2_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(!grepl(platform, tissue_cell_type)) %>% pull(SIGNATURE_NAME)
  
  # Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
  go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
    column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
    select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))
  
  # Build group vector for these two groups
  # Build correct group vector using SIGNATURE_NAME
  group_vec <- summary_df %>%
    filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
    mutate(group = ifelse(tissue_cell_type == platform, platform, "other cell/tissue types")) %>%
    select(SIGNATURE_NAME, group) %>%
    deframe()

  
  # Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
  results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
    # Separate values for the two groups
    group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == platform])])
    group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other cell/tissue types"])])
  
    # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
    if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
      test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
      c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
    } else {
      c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
    }
  })
  
  # Convert results to a dataframe
  results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
  colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
  results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
  
  # Adjust p-values using BH correction
  results_df <- results_df %>%
    mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    arrange(p_adj)
  
  # Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
  results_df <- results_df %>%
    select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)
  
  # Get significant GO terms
  significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)
  
  # Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
  gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
    gt() %>%
    tab_header(
      title = paste(platform, "vs. other cell/tissue types | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test")
    ) %>%
    cols_label(
      GO_term = "GO Term",
      p_value = "Raw p-value",
      p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
    ) %>%
    tab_spanner(
      label = "Enrichment Results",
      columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
    ) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
      ),
      locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
    )
  
  # Add the table to the list of results
  all_results[[platform]] <- gt_table
}

# no significant terms
```

```{r platform aggregated vs individual signatures}
# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "aggregated"
group_1_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(grepl("aggregated", SIGNATURE_NAME)) %>% pull(SIGNATURE_NAME)
group_2_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(!grepl("aggregated", SIGNATURE_NAME)) %>% pull(SIGNATURE_NAME)

colnames(go_mat) <- gsub("up_", "", colnames(go_mat))

# Filter GO matrix
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% group_1_sigs, "aggregated signatures", "individual signatures")) %>%
  deframe()

# Compute median difference per GO term
median_diffs_df <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "aggregated signatures"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "individual signatures"])])

  median_agg <- median(group_1_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  median_indiv <- median(group_2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

  diff <- median_indiv - median_agg
  return(diff)
})
median_diffs_df <- data.frame(GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered), median_diff = median_diffs_df)

# Mann-Whitney test
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "aggregated signatures"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "individual signatures"])])

  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Prepare results
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  left_join(median_diffs_df, by = "GO_term") %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Top 10 GO terms
# Top 10 GO terms
top10_positive <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff > 0)  %>% arrange(desc(median_diff)) %>% slice(1:10)
top10_negative <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff < 0) %>% arrange(median_diff) %>% slice(1:10)

# Create gt tables
gt_top10_positive <- top10_positive %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 Upregulated GO Terms Enriched in Individual Signatures") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Individual - Aggregated)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

gt_top10_negative <- top10_negative %>%
  select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO Terms Enriched in Aggregated Signatures") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Individual - Aggregated)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Combine top 10 positive and negative as a single dataframe first
top_combined_df <- bind_rows(
  top10_positive %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Individual Signatures"),
  top10_negative %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Aggregated Signatures")
)

# Create one combined gt table
gt_top_bottom <- top_combined_df %>%
  select(GO_term, Enriched_in, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top Upregulated GO Terms More Enriched in Individual or Aggregated Signatures") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    Enriched_in = "Enriched In",
    median_diff = "Median Difference (Individual - Aggregated)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Display combined table
gtsave(gt_top_bottom, "up_indiv_aggr_signiGO_terms.pdf")
```
